content.speakerText: Did you follow me on Instagram? I just posted my beach vacation photos!
content.speakerTextCn: 你关注我Instagram了吗？我刚发了海滩度假的照片！

options.text: Already followed! Your pics are amazing 😍
I don't have an Instagram account.
I'll follow you next week when I have time.
Why do you keep asking? It's annoying.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了非正式语气 'Already followed!' 和 'amazing'，符合原对话中 'fire' 的积极回应风格。选项2虽然真实，但缺乏回应的社交礼貌；选项3拖延回应，不符合即时确认的语境；选项4语气敌对，不符合友好社交场景。

content.speakerText: Hey, did you hit follow on my TikTok? I posted that dance challenge!
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿，你关注我TikTok了吗？我发了那个舞蹈挑战！

options.text: I saw it on your story—great job!
I don't know who you are.
I'll follow you if you follow me back.

content.explanation: 正确答案用 'I saw it on your story' 表达了间接关注，符合非正式语境中常见的委婉回应。选项2过于冷漠，选项3时间错误（不确认当前状态），选项4带有交易语气，不符合自然社交表达。

content.speakerText: You haven't followed me on Twitter yet, right? I just tweeted about the new concert!
content.speakerTextCn: 你还没关注我Twitter吧？我刚发了关于新演唱会的推文！

options.text: Oops, my bad—I'm on it right now!

content.explanation: 正确答案使用 'Oops, my bad' 和 'I'm on it right now' 表达了承认疏忽并立即行动，符合原对话中 'gimme a sec' 的补救语气。选项2虽然真实，但回避了互动；选项3与话题无关；选项4具有攻击性，不符合友好确认场景。
